actor_classes.label: Cohort
actor_classes.description: Mutable population slice within an archetype. Represents a coherent group of people with shared exposure, stance, expression level, and trust pattern. One LLM call typically corresponds to one cohort, not one individual.

actor_classes.label: Hero
actor_classes.description: High-impact individual agent (executive, organizer, journalist, regulator, politician) with named institutional reach and direct event power.

actor_classes.label: God-Agent
actor_classes.description: Universe-level reviewer that sees post-tick state and decides whether the universe should continue, freeze, kill, or branch. The god-agent never rewrites parent history.

action_class_definitions.read: Tools that retrieve information visible to the actor (read_visible_feed, read_visible_events, read_own_queued_events, read_own_recent_actions, read_retrieved_memory).
action_class_definitions.social: Tools that produce or react to social content (create_social_post, comment_on_post, repost, upvote_or_promote, downvote_or_criticize, follow_actor, unfollow_actor, stay_silent).
action_class_definitions.event_minor: Tools that schedule or modify low-impact events (queue_event for protests/letters/etc, modify_own_queued_event, cancel_own_queued_event, support_event, oppose_event).
action_class_definitions.event_major: Same tools as event_minor, but with permission to schedule high-impact event types like crackdowns, policy_votes, or formal_investigations that are restricted to heroes.
action_class_definitions.group: Tools that propose population-mass changes (propose_split, propose_merge, propose_create_coalition, propose_join_coalition, propose_leave_coalition).
action_class_definitions.state_report: Tools that emit self-rated state (self_rate_emotions, self_rate_issue_stance, estimate_perceived_majority, estimate_willingness_to_speak, estimate_action_threshold).
action_class_definitions.god_review: Tools restricted to the god-agent (continue, freeze, kill, spawn_candidate, spawn_active, mark_key_event, write_tick_summary).
